meaning: n.pl.灰烬,骨灰,尸体,文化遗址
examples: She wanted her ashes to be scattered at sea.
The pages crinkled and curled and turned to ashes in the fire.
The volcano spewed out more scorching volcanic ashes, gases, and rocks.
It is where many old Australians retire and where their ashes are scattered at life's end.
The ashes of a man were stolen from his widow's bedroom while she slept.
